TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Minimum Data Set (MDS) (derived) 

VALUES: 1–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW creates a Medicare Timeline file to identify the type of facility or level of acuity of care received 
by the beneficiary each day. Using CMS rules, CCW employs a hierarchy of claims and MDS assessment
